name: oleks-toolkit
description: Reusable Claude Code entities for full-stack React + Flask development. Includes agents, commands, skills, and templates covering React frontend, Python Flask backend, and Playwright E2E testing.

plugins.name: oleksandr-toolkit
plugins.description: Reusable Claude Code entities for full-stack React + Flask development. Includes 6 agents, 5 commands (including /synchronize for bidirectional plugin sync), 15 skills, and 15 templates covering React frontend, Python Flask backend, and Playwright E2E testing.
